_meta.title: US PLMN IDs
_meta.source: US MCC/MNC (PLMN ID) allocations from live Wikipedia 'Mobile country code' ITU region 3xx (MCCs 310-316: US, PR, GU, VI, AS)
_meta.verified: Single-source (Wikipedia 'Mobile country code', 2026-06-05); canonical carrier codes cross-checked, long-tail statuses reproduced as-sourced. Some entries (e.g. defunct/rebranded MVNOs, pending acquisitions) drift over time.
_meta.note: Curated US Public Land Mobile Network identifiers. Edit this file to add or correct entries; PlmnReferenceService loads and indexes it at startup. mnc and plmn_id are STRINGS with significant leading zeros. Never store them as numbers.
_meta.description: US Public Land Mobile Network identifiers (MCC/MNC) by carrier, for offline lookup.
_meta.schema: plmn[]: { mcc:string, mnc:string, plmn_id:string, country:string, region:string, carrier:string, operator:string, status:string }
